document.title: Basic Safety, Essential Performance for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector ADD Abyz Digital Detector
document.documentType: Basic safety and essential performance report

sourceSummary.oneLine: Report A-TCF-5-048 Rev.0 defines basic safety, essential performance, monitoring methods, EMC test standards/results, and immunity pass/fail criteria for ADD Abyz Digital Detector.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports manufacturer-defined basic safety and essential performance criteria and EMC immunity pass/fail criteria for the ADD product.
keyPoints: Operation check of the product can be monitored by acquisition software.
Acquisition image must be obtained as intended and must not have two adjacent lines or be blank.
Listed EMC standards and test items all show PASS results.
Immunity pass/fail criteria state essential performance and basic safety shall not be affected before, during, and after the test.

evidence.claim: The document covers basic safety and essential performance of ADD.
evidence.evidenceText: This document is basic safety, essential performance of the ADD.

evidence.claim: Operation check of the product can be monitored using acquisition software.
evidence.evidenceText: Operation check of the product can be monitored by using the acquisition software.

evidence.claim: The acquisition image is expected to be obtained as intended.
evidence.evidenceText: - Acquisition image is obtained as intended.

evidence.claim: The acquired image should not have two adjacent lines or be blank.
evidence.evidenceText: - The acquired image should not have two lines adjacent or be blank.

evidence.claim: DC power must be consistently supplied from the power supply when EMC testing is performed.
evidence.evidenceText: - DC power is consistently supplied from POWER SUPPLY when EMC test is performed.

evidence.claim: When connected to the power supply, the manufacturer-provided program operates normally.
evidence.evidenceText: - When connected to POWER SUPPLY, program provided by manufacturer is operated normally.

evidence.claim: Dark image acquisition using Acquisition Software is used in evaluating image criteria.
evidence.evidenceText: When acquiring a Dark image using Acquisition Software in the evaluation of the following criteria, there should be no problem with the image.

evidence.claim: CISPR 11 conducted emission on AC mains port and radiated emission results are PASS.
evidence.evidenceText:
CISPR 11

Conducted Emission on AC mains Port

PASS

Radiated Emission

PASS

Harmonic Current Emission on AC Mains Input Port

PASS

evidence.evidenceText:

PASS

evidence.claim: For immunity pass/fail criteria, essential performance and basic safety shall not be affected before, during, and after the test.
evidence.evidenceText: Before, during, and after the test, the essential performance and basic safety shall not be affected, and the performance degradation which does not affect essential performance and basic safety is PASS.

evidence.claim: Detailed immunity pass/fail criteria shall be based on applicable part two standards or risk management and included in the risk management file.
evidence.evidenceText: Specific, detailed immunity pass/fail criteria, shall be based on applicable part two standards or risk management, for immunity with regard to em disturbances. These pass/fail criteria shall be included in the risk management file
